The '''YV-330 light freighter''' was a [[YV-series/Legends|YV series]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. It was 26 meters long, and its stock configuration included a twin weapons mounting beneath the cockpit. Although YV-series ships were not as easily customized as the earlier YT series, a number of standard upgrades were available, including an enhanced sensor package.<ref name="G2" />

In addition, YV-330 [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] were often modified with heavier weaponry.<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=The Phantom Menace|cardname=Modified YV-330|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/PM/Modified_YV_330_A.webp?v=2}}</ref>

At least one YV-330, the ''[[Emerald Lance]]'' was used by the [[Corellian Security Force]]s for sting operations against [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Although it appeared to be a vulnerable civilian freighter, it had sacrificed much of its freight capacity to carry a very powerful concealed armament, and attackers would discover that the ship was truly a match for them.<ref name="G2" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The only source of detailed statistics for the YV-330 is an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]], which describes the ''[[Emerald Lance]]''. The ''Emerald Lance'' is a heavily modified ship, and details such as its hyperdrive rating and crew and passenger complement cannot be taken as valid for a standard YV-330; but its external appearance is said to be identical to stock configuration apart from its more powerful sensor array, so the prominent chin turret in the accompanying illustration can be assumed to be a feature of the basic design.<ref name="G2" />
